response.overview: In a world where dreams feel out of reach and the odds are stacked high, two underground artists refuse to stay invisible.  Set in a vibrant, stylized city full of neon lights, old-school rides, and bigger ambitions, this story follows two young creators chasing more than just money—they’re chasing legacy. With nothing but raw talent, late-night hustle, and unbreakable loyalty, they grind their way through setbacks, doubt, and the pressure of staying real in a world that rewards fake.
response.title: Lets Get Rich The Cartoon
